creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thank you! Please note that I had to use patch which you have sent 
to me some time ago to make compiling working in Forte. Therefore, please 
considering inclusion of patch-..::src::solaris::bin::java_wrapper_bsd.sh 
into the next patch. Also, I would like to ask you let me know if any specific 
font setup is required to run it, because I'm getting the following errors 
each time when I'm starting Java app that uses Swing: 
[error] Font specified in font.properties not found [--symbol-medium-r-normal--*-%d-*-*-p-*-adobe-fontspecific] 

Nevertheless, thank you and all FreeBSD Java team for really great work!!!
